name: python3-uvloop
title: python3-uvloop
summary: fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv
description:
fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv
uvloop is a fast, drop-in replacement of the built-in asyncio
event loop. uvloop is implemented in Cython and uses libuv
under the hood. It makes asyncio 2-4x faster.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-uvloop because fast implementation of asyncio event loop on top of libuv.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-uvloop as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-uvloop with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-uvloop --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
